en.title: Community Buyback Example Vault UI
en.subtitle: Live CA Store example for the community-approved buyback vault. Holders stake the tax token to vote a permanent burn target.
en.owner.ownerNotice: Only the vault owner can open a new proposal. Finalize remains public once a vote window ends.
en.errors.stageUnavailable: This vault flow is only available after DEX listing.
en.errors.connectWallet: Connect a wallet before using vault actions.
en.errors.switchNetwork: Switch the wallet to {requiredChain} before continuing.
en.errors.voteClosed: Voting is not open for the current proposal.
en.errors.alreadyVoted: This wallet already voted on the current proposal.
en.errors.withdrawUnavailable: There is no withdrawable stake for this wallet.
en.errors.ownerOnly: Only the vault owner can open a proposal.
en.errors.invalidTarget: Enter a valid ERC20 target address.
en.errors.targetLocked: The vault has already locked a permanent target.
en.errors.proposalNotOpen: The vault has not opened the next proposal window yet.
en.errors.finalizeUnavailable: This proposal cannot be finalized yet.
en.errors.txFailed: Transaction failed. Check the wallet prompt or contract state and try again.
en.notices.riskMissing: This Vault UI must integrate the current contract risk status before delivery. Read riskLevel from host Vault/TaxInfo context and display it prominently.
en.notices.listedOnly: This real example follows the live listed-stage vault path. Keep the action area visible, but disable actions when the host says the token is not listed.
en.notices.switchNetwork: The connected wallet is on the wrong chain. Switch to {requiredChain} before continuing with vault actions.

zh.title: Community Buyback Example Vault UI
zh.subtitle: 真实 CA Store 示例：社区批准式回购金库。持币人质押税币，对永久销毁目标进行投票。
zh.owner.ownerNotice: 只有金库 owner 能发起新提案。投票结束后，任何人都可以执行 finalize。
zh.errors.stageUnavailable: 这个金库流程只在 DEX 上线后开放。
zh.errors.connectWallet: 请先连接钱包再使用金库操作。
zh.errors.switchNetwork: 请先把钱包切换到 {requiredChain} 再继续。
zh.errors.amountRequired: 请输入有效的质押数量。
zh.errors.voteClosed: 当前提案不在投票窗口内。
zh.errors.alreadyVoted: 这个钱包已经对当前提案投过票。
zh.errors.withdrawUnavailable: 当前钱包没有可提取的质押。
zh.errors.ownerOnly: 只有金库 owner 可以发起提案。
zh.errors.invalidTarget: 请输入有效的 ERC20 目标地址。
zh.errors.targetLocked: 这个金库已经锁定了永久目标。
zh.errors.proposalNotOpen: 下一个提案窗口还没有打开。
zh.errors.finalizeUnavailable: 当前提案还不能执行结算。
zh.errors.txFailed: 交易失败。请检查钱包弹窗或合约状态后重试。
zh.notices.riskMissing: 这个 Vault UI 必须接入当前合约风险状态后才能交付。请从 host Vault/TaxInfo context 读取 riskLevel，并在界面中显著展示。
zh.notices.listedOnly: 这个真实示例走的是线上已上架金库流程。即便 host 说当前 token 未上架，也应该保留操作区，只把不可用按钮禁掉。
zh.notices.switchNetwork: 当前钱包链不对。请先切换到 {requiredChain}，再继续金库操作。
